form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 44-day let-up. First-up after two months 14th of 16 at Tokyo Dirt on February 22 over 1400m, 13 len behind Atomic Breath with 55.0kg at $26. Previously second-up 10th of 16 at Nakayama Dirt on December 13 over 1800m, 15 len behind Ganda carrying 55.0kg at $29.50. Solid top-three hope.

form.formComment: Comes off a 51 day let-up. Most recently second last of 10 at Kyoto Dirt on February 15 over 1800m, 24 len behind Gaura Disco carrying 57.0kg at $286.20. form.formComment: Was at very long odds at debut, got back early 10th of 14 at Hanshin Dirt on February 21 over 1800m, 18 len behind Acorn Dream carrying 57.0kg at $57.60. Deserves another chance.
